name: Orb of Corrosion
description: Seepage from the wounds of a warrior deity, sealed in an arcanist's orb following a campaign of vicious slaughter.

abilities.name: Corrosion
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply armor reduction and movement speed slow on enemy units. Armor Reduction: 2. Move Speed Slow: 8%. Duration: 2. Health Restore Reduction: 16%. Move Speed Slow: 16%. The corrosive attacks also reduce the effectiveness of health restoration on the targets.
